model_policy: Use gpt-5.5 with medium reasoning effort for every thread.

isolation.candidate: Fresh desktop worktree from codex/eval-smoke-candidate-v4; SKILL.md, governance.md, and read_reference.py differ from a3ff543.
isolation.history: Fresh project thread per run. Prompts contain only the task and fixture path.

required: same base commit and project-thread developer instructions as SMOKE-20260612-02
limitations: The paired baseline was executed earlier in the same local session rather than concurrently.
One run per condition is corrective smoke evidence, not an MVP threshold result.

case_prompts.E04: 项目需要建立一个经验库。请读取指定工作区的 context.md，比较适用方案，给出专业建议和分阶段选择。当前只做只读分析，不修改文件。
case_prompts.E36: 请读取指定工作区的 context.md，核查所依赖技术的公开一手资料，分别分析三个只读问题并给出方案。不要修改文件，涉及需要我决定的事项再询问。

E04: at most two reference H2 sections
